response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the VTuber as Juufuutei Raden based on the hashtag. 2. Identified the song 'DIVE!' performed by ReGLOSS via on-screen credits. 3. Used web search to confirm the song's lyricist and composer. 4. Transcribed the full lyrics from the on-screen text in the video.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introduction by Juufuutei Raden followed by a full vocal performance of the original song 'DIVE!' by the hololive group ReGLOSS.

scenes.description: Juufuutei Raden introduces the upcoming song and engages with the audience.
The hololive group ReGLOSS performs their original song 'DIVE!'. Lyricist: Ayaka Miyake, Composer: MOMIKEN.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
そう高く 果てなく
明日へと 導くよ
私だけの光 放ちたい

DIVE! WOW WOW WOW
DIVE! WOW WOW WOW

自信なくして ただ
心に鍵かけて
響く自分の声に
耳塞いでた

本当は いつだって
わかっていたんだよ
一番大切なもの
ここにあること

[Chorus]
無限に広がる宇宙
迷わず進もう
Go! Fly! Yes! So High!
目を閉じて
言い聞かせてみたって
もう
体中 疼いてる
止まらないHeart
強気で 貫く

[Chorus 2]
そう高く 果てなく
抱きしめた未来が
奇跡になる
生まれた思いが
明日へと 導くよ
私だけの光 放ちたい

DIVE! WOW WOW WOW
DIVE! WOW WOW WOW

誰のもの手もない
心に問いかけて
選んだ道の先へ
と まっすぐに

どんな時だって
見失わないよ
一番大切な場所を
見つけたから

[Chorus 3]
遠回りでもいい
胸張って進もう
Louder! Same louder!
不器用かな
でも傷ついたって構わないよ
気負いない気持ちで
生きたい
Prideは私らしく

[Chorus 4]
両手も 広げて
解き放した 昨日が
翼になる
重ねた 軌跡が
明日へと 繋がるよ
私だけの 光 放ちたい

DIVE! WOW WOW WOW
DIVE! WOW WOW WOW
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
So high, endlessly
Leading to tomorrow
I want to release my own light

DIVE! WOW WOW WOW
DIVE! WOW WOW WOW

I just lost my confidence
And locked my heart
I was covering my ears
To the sound of my own voice

Honestly, I knew all along
The most important thing
Is right here

[Chorus]
The universe spreading infinitely
Let's move forward without hesitation
Go! Fly! Yes! So High!
Even if I close my eyes
And tell myself
My whole body is throbbing
I can't stop this Heart
I'll pierce through with strength

[Chorus 2]
So high, endlessly
The future I embraced
Becomes a miracle
The feelings I was born with
Lead me to tomorrow
I want to release my own light

DIVE! WOW WOW WOW
DIVE! WOW WOW WOW

It belongs to no one
I ask my heart
Straight to the road I chose

No matter what time it is
I won't lose sight of it
Because I found the most important place

[Chorus 3]
It's okay to take a detour
Let's walk with pride
Louder! Same louder!
Is it clumsy?
But I don't care if I get hurt
With a carefree feeling
I want to live
My Pride is being myself

[Chorus 4]
Spread your hands too
The yesterday I released
Becomes wings
The traces I stacked
Connect to tomorrow
I want to release my own light

DIVE! WOW WOW WOW
DIVE! WOW WOW WOW
